reminder.notes: Fixed the bottom nav bar: the add button used to float above the row while the other icons sat inline, looking misaligned -- now all five buttons (today/upcoming/add/categories/settings) share one baseline and span the full width evenly. Inactive tab icons are more visible now. Also cleaned up the Upcoming/Categories/Settings page titles (dropped the trailing slash styling).

ai-scanner.notes: Fixes the real cause found via v1.0.15's diagnostics: declined duplicates were older library entries whose files were already gone from disk, not a permission problem. Missing files are now labeled visibly, cleaned up instead of retried, and entries with a file that still exists get a real gallery id resolved so they use the same permission-popup delete as everything else. Adds a manual Recheck button to Find Duplicates.

mirrordrive.notes:
# MirrorDrive v0.11.1 — In-app updates, direct from the app store hub

### Features
- Added the in-app update checker and mandatory update gate: MirrorDrive now checks for a
  new version on every launch and can download and install it directly, no manual APK
  hunting required. Same proven update mechanism used by the other apps in this lineup.

### Bug fixes
- None in this release — this is the update-checker plumbing itself. See v0.11.0 for the
  prior round of dashboard stats, duplicate cleanup, and login-prompt fixes.

twinclean.notes: Diagnostic fix: the 'Connect Google Drive' failure path now shows the real underlying error instead of a generic message, so sign-in issues can actually be diagnosed. No feature changes.
